name: WYNDHAM HOTELS & RESORTS, INC.
business: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts is the world's largest hotel franchising company by number of franchised properties, with over 8,300 affiliated hotels and approximately 869,000 rooms located in approximately 100 countries. The company operates a portfolio of 25 hotel brands primarily in secondary and tertiary cities. Revenues are generated from royalty fees, marketing and reservation fees, and ancillary services from franchisees.

exposures.sentence: We are at risk of attack by cybercriminals operating on a global basis attempting to gain access to such information.

We have incorporated artificial intelligence (AI) solutions into our business, offerings, services and features, primarily through third-party AI applications provided by Salesforce and Canary, and these applications may become increasingly important to our operations over time.

catalysts.event: System-wide room growth target of 4.0% - 4.5% in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Grow our system-wide rooms by approximately 4.0% - 4.5% in 2026.

catalysts.event: Quarterly cash dividend increase to $0.43 per share approved by Board
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Board approved an increase in the quarterly cash dividend to $0.43 per share.
